steps.title: Choose a real contrast
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two National Wildlife Refuges. The notes provide a clear difference: Pelican Key is in Florida on the Atlantic coast, while Sierra Ridge is in California on the Pacific coast.

steps.title: Reject noncontrasts
steps.content: A gives a general fact about endangered species, B states a similarity, and D mentions only Pelican Key in a broader statistic. The effective choice directly contrasts the refuges by location on opposite coasts. The answer is C.
